pipeline_note: Editorial reading edition rebuilt from PD woodblock scans via multi-engine OCR comparison and image adjudication. NOT a diplomatic transcript and NOT a full critical edition.
coverage_note: Cases 1–48 structurally complete. Case 49 in appendix. No apparatus in v1. Variant readings and per-leaf witness notes exist in working files but are not yet surfaced in the TEI.

publication_checks.apparatus_note: Deliberately omitted from v1; can be added later from separate witness notes.

repair_log.scope: case 1 opening + case 39 interruption + mojibake cleanup
repair_log.description: Source-draft audit found PDF p.008 left leaf missing from witness draft, truncating the case 1 無門曰 opening and dropping the case 39 interruption phrase 一句未絕。門遽曰：. All were repaired at witness/chunk/reading-edition level, then XML was regenerated. CP1252-style mojibake across the markdown chain was cleaned in the same pass.

repair_log.scope: case 6 koan restoration + volume-end title line
repair_log.description: Witness-to-draft audit found the case 6 koan opening had been truncated after 惟迦葉尊者破顏微笑 despite the witness still carrying 世尊云：吾有正法眼藏...付囑摩訶迦葉 across the facing leaves. The appendix volume-end material had also dropped the witness-backed line 無門卷 ahead of 無門關卷終. The checked-in reading-edition source, rebuild chunks, diplomatic draft, and TEI were updated and the translation XML was realigned to the new wm32 line layout.

The checked-in OpenZen source still carried the Fengxue response line 穴云：長憶江南三月裏，鷓鴣啼處百花香。 in case 24's verse block after the local reading-edition chain had already moved it back into the koan. The source-reading-edition mirror, generated TEI, and translated XML were realigned to the repaired placement. The accompanying reading-edition notes were also tightened for case 14's mixed witness layers and for the conservative opening-formula handling in cases 21 and 22.

incomplete: apparatus not yet transcribed into TEI
